# FFmpeg codec short names — vendored for `cargo xtask check`.
# Source: FFmpeg n8.1 libavcodec/codec_desc.c
# Fetched: 2026-05-20
#
# Regenerate via `cargo xtask sync` after bumping the FFMPEG_TAG constant.
# Format: `<media_type> <name> [<props>]` — one descriptor per line, sorted.
# `<media_type>` is the lowercased AVMEDIA_TYPE_* suffix
# (video / audio / subtitle / data / attachment).
# `<props>` is a comma-separated list of `AV_CODEC_PROP_*` tokens
# (prefix stripped, e.g. `BITMAP_SUB`, `TEXT_SUB`, `LOSSY`). Optional —
# codecs with no `.props` initializer omit the column entirely. The
# generator (`cargo xtask gen-codec`) uses this set to derive predicate
# methods like `SubtitleCodec::is_image_based()` (= `BITMAP_SUB`).

audio 4gv INTRA_ONLY,LOSSY
audio 8svx_exp INTRA_ONLY,LOSSY
audio 8svx_fib INTRA_ONLY,LOSSY
audio aac LOSSY
audio aac_latm LOSSY
